events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess hazard: NM/MC cable routing & protection, commercial project, observed unsupported runs, work in-progress. Need identify safety hazards, severity, immediate controls. Use NEC 300.4, 334, 330. Need decision fail because non-compliant. Risk? Unsupported cable runs can lead to damage, strain, fire? Severity maybe medium/high. Need component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete estimate maybe 60? value 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. workable empty. findings: cables not supported per NEC 334.30 (NM) and 330.30 (MC), unsupported runs create stress, sagging, potential damage, violation. actions: install listed supports/straps at required intervals (within 12 in of boxes and max 4.5 ft for NM, 6 ft for MC? Actually NEC 334.30 NM cable must be secured at intervals not exceeding 4.5 ft and within 12 in of every box. MC 330.30 secure within 12 in of boxes and at intervals not exceeding 6 ft, unless fished etc. Also protect from physical damage per 300.4. Immediate controls: stop work in affected area, support cables, inspect/re-secure, verify clearances and protection, re-inspect before concealment. references: NEC 300.4, 334.30, 330.30. Need JSON shape. Ensure no prose outside JSON.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 60,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.9,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "NM and/or MC cable runs are unsupported and not secured at required intervals",
    "Cables sag between supports, creating strain on terminations and potential insulation damage",
    "Condition violates support and protection requirements for nonmetallic-sheathed and metal-clad cables",
    "Unsupported cables are susceptible to physical damage before concealment"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop installation/concealment in the affected areas until cables are properly supported",
    "Install listed staples, straps, hangers, or other approved supports at code-required spacing",
    "Secure cables within 12 inches of every box, cabinet, or fitting",
    "Maintain required support intervals not exceeding 4.5 feet for NM cable and 6 feet for MC cable",
    "Add additional protection where cables are subject to physical damage per NEC 300.4",
    "Re-inspect and obtain approval before closing up or energizing circuits"
  ],
  "rationale": "Unsupported NM/MC cable runs violate NEC support and protection requirements, creating fire and shock hazards from cable damage, conductor stress, and failed terminations. The condition must be corrected before the work can proceed or be concealed.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 300.4 - Protection Against Physical Damage",
    "NEC 334.30 - Securing and Supporting Nonmetallic-Sheathed Cable",
    "NEC 330.30 - Securing and Supporting Metal-Clad Cable"
  ]
}
